en: What, is everyone just hanging out?
No, we're letting it all hang out.
Nelly was going to tell a story.
There's a mouse who lives in the wall behind the vending machine.
ko: 자판기 뒤 벽에 사는 쥐가 있어.

en: I feed him. Now he comes out every day at the same time.
ko: 밥을 줬더니 매일 같은 시간에 나와.

en: If people find Squeaker, he's toast.
I just want to give him his food.
And try one more time with the top hat.
ko: 실크 모자도 한 번 더 시도하고.

en: So, is everyone going to be a while, or...
Angela, I think you should tell a secret.
Okay, um, I'm going to make one up because those are more fun.
Um, so there was a guy and he...
I'm about to fart, so you guys might want to bail.
ko: 방귀 나올 것 같으니까 피하는 게 좋을 거야.
